testcase.name: Book an available room
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Book an available room &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/booking-acceptance.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma room &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m named &amp#27;[1m"Atlas"&amp#27;[22m with capacity &amp#27;[1m8&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aRoomNamedWithCapacity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mroom &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m has no existing booking&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.roomHasNoExistingBooking(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser &amp#27;[1m"alice@example.com"&amp#27;[22m books room &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m for &amp#27;[1m4&amp#27;[22m attendees from &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T09:00"&amp#27;[22m to &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T10:00"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.userBooksRoomForAttendeesFromTo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe booking receipt should not be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingReceiptShouldNotBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe booking message should be &amp#27;[1m"Booking confirmed"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingMessageShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe booking receipt room should be &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingReceiptRoomShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe room repository should have saved the booking&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theRoomRepositoryShouldHaveSavedTheBooking()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22ma confirmation should have been sent to &amp#27;[1m"alice@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aConfirmationShouldHaveBeenSentTo(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.7\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.7.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: Book a room at maximum capacity
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Book a room at maximum capacity &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/booking-acceptance.feature:13&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma room &amp#27;[1m"B202"&amp#27;[22m named &amp#27;[1m"Boreal"&amp#27;[22m with capacity &amp#27;[1m6&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aRoomNamedWithCapacity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mroom &amp#27;[1m"B202"&amp#27;[22m has no existing booking&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.roomHasNoExistingBooking(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser &amp#27;[1m"bob@example.com"&amp#27;[22m books room &amp#27;[1m"B202"&amp#27;[22m for &amp#27;[1m6&amp#27;[22m attendees from &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T11:00"&amp#27;[22m to &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T12:00"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.userBooksRoomForAttendeesFromTo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe booking receipt should not be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingReceiptShouldNotBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe booking message should be &amp#27;[1m"Booking confirmed"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingMessageShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe room repository should have saved the booking&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theRoomRepositoryShouldHaveSavedTheBooking()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22ma confirmation should have been sent to &amp#27;[1m"bob@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aConfirmationShouldHaveBeenSentTo(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Room cannot be booked when another booking overlaps
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Room cannot be booked when another booking overlaps &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/booking-conflicts.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma room &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m named &amp#27;[1m"Atlas"&amp#27;[22m with capacity &amp#27;[1m8&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aRoomNamedWithCapacity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mroom &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m already has a booking from &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T09:00"&amp#27;[22m to &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T10:00"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.roomAlreadyHasABookingFromTo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser &amp#27;[1m"charlie@example.com"&amp#27;[22m books room &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m for &amp#27;[1m3&amp#27;[22m attendees from &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T09:30"&amp#27;[22m to &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T10:30"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.userBooksRoomForAttendeesFromTo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma booking error should be thrown with message &amp#27;[1m"Room already booked"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aBookingErrorShouldBeThrownWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe booking receipt should be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingReceiptShouldBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe room repository should not have saved the booking&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theRoomRepositoryShouldNotHaveSavedTheBooking()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mno confirmation should have been sent&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.noConfirmationShouldHaveBeenSent()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Room can be booked just after another booking
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Room can be booked just after another booking &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/booking-conflicts.feature:12&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma room &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m named &amp#27;[1m"Atlas"&amp#27;[22m with capacity &amp#27;[1m8&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aRoomNamedWithCapacity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mroom &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m already has a booking from &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T09:00"&amp#27;[22m to &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T10:00"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.roomAlreadyHasABookingFromTo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser &amp#27;[1m"diane@example.com"&amp#27;[22m books room &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m for &amp#27;[1m3&amp#27;[22m attendees from &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T10:00"&amp#27;[22m to &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T11:00"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.userBooksRoomForAttendeesFromTo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe booking receipt should not be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingReceiptShouldNotBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe booking message should be &amp#27;[1m"Booking confirmed"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingMessageShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe room repository should have saved the booking&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theRoomRepositoryShouldHaveSavedTheBooking()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22ma confirmation should have been sent to &amp#27;[1m"diane@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aConfirmationShouldHaveBeenSentTo(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Unknown room cannot be booked
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Unknown room cannot be booked &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/booking-errors.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mroom &amp#27;[1m"Z999"&amp#27;[22m does not exist&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.roomDoesNotExist(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser &amp#27;[1m"alice@example.com"&amp#27;[22m books room &amp#27;[1m"Z999"&amp#27;[22m for &amp#27;[1m3&amp#27;[22m attendees from &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T09:00"&amp#27;[22m to &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T10:00"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.userBooksRoomForAttendeesFromTo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma booking error should be thrown with message &amp#27;[1m"Room not found"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aBookingErrorShouldBeThrownWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe booking receipt should be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingReceiptShouldBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe room repository should not have saved the booking&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theRoomRepositoryShouldNotHaveSavedTheBooking()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mno confirmation should have been sent&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.noConfirmationShouldHaveBeenSent()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Room capacity cannot be exceeded
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Room capacity cannot be exceeded &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/booking-errors.feature:11&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma room &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m named &amp#27;[1m"Atlas"&amp#27;[22m with capacity &amp#27;[1m8&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aRoomNamedWithCapacity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mroom &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m has no existing booking&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.roomHasNoExistingBooking(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser &amp#27;[1m"alice@example.com"&amp#27;[22m books room &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m for &amp#27;[1m12&amp#27;[22m attendees from &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T09:00"&amp#27;[22m to &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T10:00"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.userBooksRoomForAttendeesFromTo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma booking error should be thrown with message &amp#27;[1m"Room capacity exceeded"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aBookingErrorShouldBeThrownWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe booking receipt should be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingReceiptShouldBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe room repository should not have saved the booking&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theRoomRepositoryShouldNotHaveSavedTheBooking()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mno confirmation should have been sent&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.noConfirmationShouldHaveBeenSent()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: End date must be after start date
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m End date must be after start date &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/booking-errors.feature:20&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma room &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m named &amp#27;[1m"Atlas"&amp#27;[22m with capacity &amp#27;[1m8&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aRoomNamedWithCapacity(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mroom &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m has no existing booking&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.roomHasNoExistingBooking(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser &amp#27;[1m"alice@example.com"&amp#27;[22m books room &amp#27;[1m"A101"&amp#27;[22m for &amp#27;[1m4&amp#27;[22m attendees from &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T10:00"&amp#27;[22m to &amp#27;[1m"2026-06-10T09:00"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.userBooksRoomForAttendeesFromTo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma booking error should be thrown with message &amp#27;[1m"End date must be after start date"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.aBookingErrorShouldBeThrownWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe booking receipt should be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.BookingSteps.theBookingReceiptShouldBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe room repository should not
